security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Malicious actors could alter vote data during transmission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote data integrity is not explicitly guaranteed during transmission.

assumptions: The system does not employ end-to-end encryption for vote transmission.
The actor has the capability to intercept and modify vote messages.

mitigation.strategy: Implement end-to-end encryption for vote messages.

description: An attacker could intercept and alter the vote data before it reaches the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: The system lacks mechanisms to ensure the authenticity of the voter.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Votes are not digitally signed and can be repudiated by the voter.

assumptions: The voting system lacks mechanisms for verifying the identity and authenticity of voters.
The actor can deny having submitted a particular vote.

mitigation.strategy: Implement digital signatures to ensure vote authenticity and non-repudiation.

description: A user can vote and then later deny having cast their vote.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes might be revealed before tallying.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Votes are not encrypted in transit or at rest.  Information disclosure is unlikely due to the nature of public blockchains.

assumptions: The voting system does not encrypt votes during transmission or storage.
An attacker can access the unencrypted vote data.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust encryption and access controls for vote data.

description: An attacker might gain access to the unencrypted votes before the final tally is made.
